scope_caveats: pydrake not importable — honest install-gated skip. ImportError: No module named 'pydrake'. Install: `pip install drake` (Ubuntu) or apt `apt install drake` (multi-GB binary).
Toy 2-link planar arm Lyapunov stability check — NOT a contact / payload / actuator-fault verification. Real absorption needs a measured arm + measured payload + signed safety-case dossier.
citations: Drake SSOT — drake.mit.edu (Tedrake et al., MIT / TRI).
